ham.subject: Upcoming Server Maintenance – July 12, 2024
ham.body:
Dear colleagues,

This is a reminder that the internal file‑sync service will undergo an upgrade on July 12, 2024 from 23:30 to 01:30 UTC. During this short window the sync server cluster will be restarted and the latest security patches will be applied.

No action is required on your part; you can continue using your sync apps as usual. If you notice any sync disruptions after the maintenance, please open a ticket through the IT support portal.

Thank you for your cooperation.

IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Account is At Risk
spam.body:
Dear valued customer,

We have detected irregular activity on your account ending with 4529. As a precaution, the account has been temporarily locked pending verification.

Please confirm your identity within the next 24 hours or your account will be permanently closed. Click <URL> to verify your information.

Failure to complete this step will result in a full account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Kind regards,
Global Bank Secure Pay
